description: CompositionRed polo neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with red collar and placket, and embroidered logo in white on the left side of chestWash care1. Machine wash separately in cold water2. Use mild detergent3. Do not bleach4. Avoid soaking5. Remove promptly6. Line dry inside out in shade7. Warm iron only8. Do not iron directly on print/embroideryFittingSlim FitLook hot this summer in this fire engine red polo neck tee from classic polo. The embroidered white logo on the left side of the chest adds on to the interesting detailing of this t-shirt. Team this with jeans or chinos and comfortable-yet-stylish lifestyle footwear from the wide collection available at myntra for casual occasions.Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-6', Shoulders-18"
